prestazioni: Engine swap to a modernized AMC 401 (engine code: AMX-401) with forged internals: Eagle 4340 forged crankshaft (3.68" stroke), Manley 6.125" forged H-beam connecting rods, and JE 12.5:1 compression forged pistons with Total Seal rings for high-RPM durability. Pair with a custom billet aluminum oil pan by Stef’s Fabrication for improved lubrication under lateral G-forces.

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo PT6766 CEA turbocharger (67mm, 66lb/min) with a custom T4 divided exhaust housing, mounted on a stainless steel header system by Hooker Blackheart (1.75" primaries, 3" collectors). Intercooled with a custom air-to-water setup using a PWR North America heat exchanger and Bosch 044 fuel pump with dual Aeromotive A1000 regulators for E85 compatibility.

Suspension overhaul with Global West double-adjustable tubular control arms (polyurethane bushings), QA1 PRO Coil-Over shocks (2-way adjustable, 250lb/in springs), and a Detroit Speed front sway bar (1.25" diameter) paired with a Hotchkis rear sway bar (7/8"). Chassis reinforcement via a custom subframe connectors kit by Scott’s Hotrods & Customs, welded to the factory unibody for rigidity.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny AMX kit (Javelin-specific, not the generic S30 kit), including extended front fenders (2.5" wider), rear quarter panels (3.5" wider), and a custom ducktail spoiler with integrated third brake light. Painted in BASF Glasurit 90-Line ‘Hemi Orange’ with a satin clear coat for depth.

Custom billet aluminum grille by Billet Specialties (AMX-specific ‘V’ pattern) with a hidden front-mounted intercooler duct. Side markers replaced with sequential LED units by Diode Dynamics, integrated into the lower rocker panels. Rear end features a custom LED taillight assembly by United Pacific, replicating the original AMX design but with modern optics.

Interior retrimmed in Alcantara (Autofiber ‘Charcoal’) with custom door cards featuring AMC ‘401’ embroidery. Seats replaced with Bride Zeta III (low-back, fixed-back) in black Alcantara with red stitching, mounted on custom subframes to retain the original AMX floorpan. Steering wheel upgraded to a Nardi Classic 380mm (deep-dish) with a custom AMC horn button.
